phrases.english: Let your mind wander, then build.
It's four o'clock, time for a break.
phrases.slovak: Sú štyri hodiny, čas na prestávku.
phrases.transliteration: Soo shtiri hodiny, chas na prestavku.

phrases.english: Only seven days, in a week.
Breathe in calm, breathe out stress.
Quiet your mind, feel the peace.
Let go of worries, embrace stillness.
I can do this, step by step.
Little by little, progress is made.

phrases.slovak: Učím sa, a to je dobre.
phrases.transliteration: Ucim sa, a to je dobre.

phrases.slovak: Uč sa po slovensky, hovor po slovensky.
phrases.transliteration: Uch sa po slovensk'i, hovor po slovensk'i.

phrases.slovak: Cvič každý deň, zlepšuj sa každý týždeň.
phrases.transliteration: Chvích kadží d'en, zlepšuj sa kadží t'iždeň.

phrases.english: You can do this, believe it.
Hello, where is the train station?
phrases.slovak: Dobrý deň, kde je vlaková stanica?
phrases.transliteration: Doh-bree dyen, gde yeh vlah-koh-vah stah-nee-tsah?

phrases.english: Excuse me, can I have the bill?
I would like a ticket, please.
Where can I find a taxi?
Find your center, feel the calm.
We have good times, don't we?

phrases.slovak: Pomôžte mi, prosím. Stratil/Stratila som sa.
phrases.transliteration: Pomoh-tye-teh mee, pro-seem. Stra-teel/Stra-tee-la som sah.

phrases.english: Excuse me, where is the bread?
Do you have this in blue?

phrases.slovak: Všetko je v poriadku, nebojte sa.
phrases.transliteration: Vsetko ye v poriadku, nebojte sa.

phrases.slovak: Rozšír si obzory, uč sa slovensky.
phrases.transliteration: Rozshir si obzory, uch sa slovensky.

phrases.english: Feel the ground, beneath your feet.
Listen to your body, it speaks.
Hello there, nice to meet you.

phrases.slovak: Dobrý deň, dúfam, že sa ti darí.
phrases.transliteration: Dob-ree dyen, doo-fam, zheh sah tee dah-ree.

phrases.english: Good evening, have a good night.

phrases.slovak: Často sa usmievaj, nahlas sa smej.
phrases.transliteration: Často sa usmievaj, nahlas sa smej.

phrases.slovak: Učte sa po slovensky, krok za krokom.
phrases.transliteration: Uch-te sa po slo-ven-sky, krok za kro-kom.

phrases.slovak: Hraj sa s možnosťami, nájdi kúzlo.
phrases.transliteration: Hraj sa s mož-nosť-a-mi, náj-di kú-zlo.

phrases.english: Thank you, have a nice day.

phrases.slovak: Som rád, že sme sa stretli, priateľ.
phrases.transliteration: Som rád, že sme sa stretli, priateľ.

phrases.slovak: Spoj sa s ľuďmi, zdieľaj nápady.
phrases.transliteration: Spoj sa s l'ud'mi, zd'ielay nápady.

phrases.english: My dear mother, I love you.

phrases.slovak: Neviem si predstaviť, život bez teba.
phrases.transliteration: Nev-yem si pred-stah-veet, zhi-vot bez teb-ah.

phrases.english: Brighten a day, with a kind word.
Offer a hand, if you can.
Be a friend, always be there.
When the clock strikes midnight, dreams begin.
phrases.slovak: Keď hodiny odbijú polnoc, sny sa začnú.
phrases.transliteration: Kedy hodiny odbijú polnoc, sny sa začnú.

phrases.english: Every second counts, use them wisely.
phrases.slovak: Každá sekunda sa počíta, používaj ich múdro.
phrases.transliteration: Každá sekunda sa počíta, používaj ich múdro.

phrases.english: Morning arrives, a new chance appears.
phrases.slovak: Ráno prichádza, nová šanca sa objavuje.
phrases.transliteration: Ráno prichádza, nová šanca sa objavuje.

phrases.english: Future is coming, prepare for it now.
phrases.slovak: Budúcnosť prichádza, priprav sa na ňu teraz.
phrases.transliteration: Budúcnosť prichádza, priprav sa na ňu teraz.

phrases.english: Yesterday is gone, today is your gift.
phrases.slovak: Včera je preč, dnes je tvoj dar.
phrases.transliteration: Včera je preč, dnes je tvoj dar.

phrases.english: Slow and steady, wins the race.
Good things, take time to grow.
Embrace the journey, enjoy the view.
Sing a song, make a friend.
Play your tune, share your joy.
Hum a little, feel the peace.
Dance with me, under the stars.
My new jacket, is very warm.
phrases.slovak: Moja nová bunda, je veľmi teplá.
phrases.transliteration: Moya nova bunda, ye vel'mi tepla.

phrases.english: I need trousers, for the party.
She wears a dress, so elegant.

phrases.slovak: Učte sa po slovensky, milujte život.
phrases.transliteration: Uch-te sa po slo-ven-sky, mi-luv-te zhi-vot.

phrases.english: Open a book, open your mind.
